nodes.name: ⏰ Weekly Trigger (Monday 6AM)
nodes.notes: Fires every Monday at 6AM. Adjust timezone in n8n settings.

nodes.name: 🔍 Scrape Etsy Trending
nodes.notes: Fetches Etsy trending digital downloads page. Raw HTML returned for parsing.

nodes.name: 🔍 Scrape Creative Fabrica
nodes.notes: Fetches Creative Fabrica popular freebies for trend insight.

nodes.name: 📈 Google Trends API
nodes.notes: Pulls daily trending search topics from Google Trends. No API key needed.

nodes.name: 🔀 Merge & Package Research Data
nodes.notes: Combines all scraped data into one structured package for Ollama to analyze.

values.content: You are an expert digital product market researcher specializing in Etsy, Gumroad, and digital marketplaces. You identify trending digital products that can be recreated quickly using free AI tools like Canva, Leonardo.ai, Ollama, and Gamma.app. You always respond in valid JSON only.

=Based on these trending categories and market data: {{JSON.stringify($json)}}

Identify the TOP 8 digital product opportunities this week. For each product:
1. Analyze which categories are hottest right now
2. Score recreatability (1-10, higher = easier to remake with free AI tools)
3. Estimate potential price range
4. Suggest the exact free AI tool to create it
5. Give a specific product idea (not generic)

Respond ONLY with this JSON structure:
{
  "research_week": "string",
  "market_insights": "2-3 sentence summary of trends",
  "top_opportunities": [
    {
      "rank": 1,
      "product_name": "specific product title",
      "category": "Printables|AI Art|eBooks|Templates",
      "trend_score": 85,
      "recreatability_score": 9,
      "estimated_price_min": 3,
      "estimated_price_max": 15,
      "creation_tool": "Canva Free",
      "creation_time_hours": 2,
      "target_keyword": "main SEO keyword",
      "description": "what this product is and why it sells",
      "creation_steps": ["step 1", "step 2", "step 3"]
    }
  ]
}

nodes.name: 🧠 Ollama Research Agent (mistral)
nodes.notes: Uses Mistral model to analyze trends and identify top 8 product opportunities. Requires Ollama running locally on port 11434.

nodes.name: ⚙️ Parse Research Results
nodes.notes: Safely parses Ollama JSON response. Handles markdown code blocks and malformed JSON.

nodes.name: 📋 Prep Rows for Google Sheets
nodes.notes: Converts the research array into individual rows, each with an APPROVED column set to PENDING.

nodes.name: 📊 Write to Google Sheets (Research Tab)
nodes.notes: SETUP REQUIRED: Replace YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID_HERE with your actual Sheet ID. Create a sheet tab named 'Research_Opportunities' with matching column headers.

nodes.name: ✅ Log Research Complete
nodes.notes: Final step of Phase 1. Logs completion. You now manually review Google Sheets and approve products.

meta.description: Phase 1: Weekly research agent. Scrapes Etsy, Gumroad, Creative Fabrica. Uses Mistral via Ollama to identify top 8 trending digital product opportunities. Writes results to Google Sheets for human approval.
